headline: Constellation Brands Expands Non Alcoholic Lineup With Hop Wtr Acquisition
summary: Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) has acquired full ownership of Hop Wtr, a non-alcoholic sparkling water brand infused with hops and adaptogens. The deal expands STZ's non-alcoholic portfolio at a time when demand for no- and low-alcohol options continues to build. Hop Wtr will sit alongside STZ's existing beer, wine, and spirits businesses as the company responds to moderation and wellness trends. Constellation Brands, best known for beer, wine, and spirits labels, is pushing further into...
